common.tagline: The next-generation fitness ecosystem powered by Artificial Intelligence. Designed for demanding athletes and visionary coaches.
common.underDevelopmentDesc: The SmartFit technical team is actively working on this section to provide you with a perfect experience. This page will be available soon with all its features. Thank you for your patience!

exerciseDB.desc: Over 1000+ exercises meticulously cataloged. Whether you're at the gym, at home or traveling, our AI always finds the perfect movement.

integrations.desc: Never lose a drop of sweat again. SmartFit automatically retrieves your runs, steps and burned calories from your favorite apps and watches.

communique.title: Announcement of a Strategic Partnership and Roadmap
communique.lead: Bouda Med Company officially announces the appointment of « Web Geo » to ensure the direction and complete supervision of the strategic project « Bouda El Mouhandis ».
communique.body: This large-scale project will span a precise duration of 13 months and 1 day, officially starting on May 31, 2026 and ending with the achievement of its final objectives on July 1, 2027.
objectives: Deployment of artificial intelligence tools for student assistance.
Rigorous supervision and guidance until obtaining final results (PFE).
communique.keyStepsDesc: The roadmap is divided into several critical phases, from the Summer 2026 phase dedicated to development, to the PFE phase in spring 2027 for integration into the job market through targeted AI ecosystems.
communique.pdfDesc: Download the full press release in PDF format.

projectS9.title: Project S9
projectS9.subtitle: Final Academic Semester & Operational Excellence
projectS9.overview: This phase is the culmination of the academic journey before the PFE. It aims to acquire the advanced technical and management skills necessary to finish the curriculum brilliantly, under the direction of Bouda Med Company.
projectS9.modulesDesc: Details of strategic modules optimally managed during this period.

modules.title: 1. IS Urbanization
modules.desc: Study of the strategic alignment of information systems with business objectives. Functional and application mapping to design an agile and scalable IS.

modules.title: 2. Software Architecture
modules.desc: Mastery of design patterns. Creation of robust, maintainable software architectures suitable for large-scale projects.

modules.title: 3. Big Data Engineering
modules.desc: Learning concepts, tools and architectures to process and analyze massive data. Transforming complex data into strategic insights.

modules.title: 4. Cloud & Virtualization
modules.desc: Deployment and management of remote IT infrastructure (virtualization, Cloud IaaS, PaaS, SaaS platforms).

modules.title: 5. Web Pentesting Workshop
modules.desc: Hands-on training in offensive security. Penetration testing techniques to identify, exploit and fix web vulnerabilities.

modules.title: 6. Network Interconnection & Security
modules.desc: Design and administration of advanced network architectures. Routing protocols, switching and data protection mechanisms.

modules.title: 7. Ethics & Rights
modules.desc: Awareness of the legal framework (IT law, privacy, intellectual property) and professional engineering ethics.

modules.title: 8. Languages & Communication 5
modules.desc: Bilingual communication (FR/EN). Public speaking, report writing and persuasive communication techniques.

projectS9.meetingsDesc: Meetings will be held in the Intelligent Digital Meeting Room to monitor academic performance and project progress.

meetings.desc: Semester kickoff. Review of academic objectives for each module, schedule setup in the Encadrant app and update on the « Geo Vest » project.
AI-powered analysis of current academic performance. Progress update on practical projects and sports objective tracking.
Logistical and strategic preparation for S9 final exams. Update on the Angelfitness platform and preliminary PFE research discussions.

projectEte2026.title: Summer 2026 Phase
projectEte2026.subtitle: Technology Deployment & S8 Closure
projectEte2026.overview: This phase represents the first major pillar of the « Bouda El Mouhandis » project. It is a major transition period combining the completion of an academic/operational cycle (S8) with the establishment of the technological foundation (100% AI) that will serve the rest of the project.
projectEte2026.projectsDesc: This phase is divided into two main work streams.
projectEte2026.axis1Objective: Finalize the validation of all semester 8 modules with optimal results, ensuring rigorous and documented project management.
projectEte2026.axis1Deliverable: S8 closing report + Academic performance dashboard (with grades, validated skills and areas for improvement).
projectEte2026.axis2Desc: This phase lays the technological foundations needed to accelerate the project's development and visibility.

axis2Cards.title: Showcase Website with Blog
axis2Cards.desc: Development and launch of the 'Bouda Med Company' marketing showcase website. Integration of an SEO-optimized blog to improve organic reach.

axis2Cards.title: Artificial Intelligence Hub
axis2Cards.desc: Setup of a centralized AI assistant. Smart chatbot, automatic report generation and predictive performance analysis.

items.label: Social Media
items.desc: Content strategy on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube

items.label: Partnerships
items.desc: Establish strategic partnerships with fitness influencers

axis2Cards.title: Governance & Documentation
axis2Cards.desc: Setup of project management tools (Jira/Notion), complete technical documentation and editorial charter for all media.

projectEte2026.meetingsDesc: Follow-up meetings for the summer phase.

meetings.desc: Kick-off of the summer phase. Review of S8 closure objectives, definition of technical work packages for the website and AI, and role distribution.
Progress check on the 6 S8 projects. Verification of website progress (mockups + content) and first tests of the AI assistant.
Validation of academic closure (S8 transcripts). Final delivery of the website MVP and AI assistant prototype.

projectSept2026.title: September
projectSept2026.subtitle: Strategic Preparation & S9 Launch
projectSept2026.overview: This one-month strategic transition phase serves as a bridge between the closure of S8 and the launch of S9. It is dedicated to consolidating achievements, administrative and academic preparation for the new semester, as well as finalizing the tools developed during the summer.
projectSept2026.projectsDesc: A key month to prepare the ground for the final academic semester.

axes.title: Administrative Closure & S8 Review
axes.objective: Finalize all administrative aspects of S8: transcripts, skills validation, and preparation of files for promotion to S9.

axes.title: Academic Preparation S9
axes.objective: Plan and organize the S9 semester: module selection, supervisor choices, and schedule preparation.

axes.title: Technology Finalization
axes.objective: Polish the tools developed during the summer: website, AI assistant, and technical documentation to make them operational.

meetings.desc: Transition phase kick-off meeting. Review of S8 assessments and preparation of S9 schedule.
Final checkpoint before S9 begins. Validation of technological tools and confirmation of academic objectives.
